ObjectName.value: Frank Bowman UMIST Mathematician oil portrait

ImageDescription.value: Frank Bowman UMIST Mathematician oil portrait

Credit.value: Photo: This is a photograph by User:Billlion of an oil painting owned by the School of Mathematics, The University of Manchester. The portrait was commissioned by Ron Butler and the artist is John Chirnside. The work was funded by a grant from the Royal Chemical Society. The portrait hung in the common room of the Maths and Social Sciences Building at UMIST until the new School of Mathematics relocated to the Alan Turing Building. It is currently in storage.

Permission.value: This is a photograph by User:Billlion of an oil painting owned by the School of Mathematics, The University of Manchester. On behalf of the School I assert that we own the copyright to the original, and that permission is given for my photograph of it to be licensed under the under the GFDL.
